title: Follow / Unfollow
description: Follow or unfollow members and shops to get updates on their activity.

flows.title: Follow a Member or Shop
flows.trigger: User taps Follow button on a member profile or shop page

steps.title: View Profile Page
steps.tooltip: User views a member profile or shop page with a FollowButton and follower count. Button hidden when viewing own profile/shop.

steps.title: Tap Follow Button
steps.tooltip: FollowButton checks auth (shows sign-in toast if unauthenticated). useFollowToggle fires mutation with isCurrentlyFollowing=false, optimistically sets status to following and increments count cache.

steps.title: Create Follow
steps.tooltip: Validates target_type (member|shop), target_id, checks auth, calls createFollowServer. Returns 201 on success.

steps.title: Insert Follow Row
steps.tooltip: INSERT into follows table. update_follower_count() trigger increments target's follower_count column.

steps.title: Show Following State
steps.tooltip: Button updates to 'Following' state (filled primary), follower count increments. Toast: 'Following — You are now following {name}.' onSettled invalidates status, count, and following queries.

flows.title: Unfollow a Member or Shop
flows.trigger: User taps Following button on a member profile or shop page

steps.title: View Followed Entity
steps.tooltip: User views a member or shop they already follow. FollowButton shows 'Following' state. On hover/focus, changes to 'Unfollow' with destructive styling.

steps.title: Tap Following Button
steps.tooltip: useFollowToggle fires mutation with isCurrentlyFollowing=true, optimistically sets status to not-following and decrements count cache. Toast: 'Unfollowed — You unfollowed {name}.'

steps.title: Delete Follow
steps.tooltip: Reads target_type and target_id from query params (not body). Calls deleteFollowServer, returns 200 on success.

steps.title: Delete Follow Row
steps.tooltip: DELETE from follows table. update_follower_count() trigger decrements target's follower_count (clamped to 0 via GREATEST).

steps.title: Show Follow State
steps.tooltip: Button reverts to 'Follow' state (outline primary), follower count decrements. onSettled invalidates status, count, and following queries.

flows.title: Check Follow Status
flows.trigger: User navigates to a member or shop profile page

steps.title: Navigate to Profile
steps.tooltip: FollowButton mounts on profile page. useFollowStatus hook fires query with targetType and targetId.

steps.title: Fetch Follow Status
steps.tooltip: Returns { is_following: boolean } via getFollowStatusServer using maybeSingle() lookup

steps.title: Render Button State
steps.tooltip: FollowButton renders as 'Follow' (outline) or 'Following' (filled primary) based on is_following response. Follower count badge also displayed.

flows.title: View Following List
flows.trigger: User navigates to their following list page

steps.title: Open Following Page
steps.tooltip: User navigates to /dashboard/following. Page is protected by proxy.ts. useFollowing() hook fires query on mount to fetch all followed entities.

steps.title: Fetch Following List
steps.tooltip: Returns FollowingItem[] with name and avatar_url resolved via batch queries on members and shops tables. Optional target_type filter.

steps.title: Render Following List
steps.tooltip: Renders FollowingCard for each item — avatar, linked name, type pill, relative date, Unfollow button. Each card manages its own useFollowToggle mutation with toast feedback. Empty state shows heart icon + 'You are not following anyone yet' + Browse CTA.

paths.label: No
paths.detail: Empty state: 'You are not following anyone yet'

flows.title: Browse Listings From Followed Sellers
flows.trigger: Authenticated user with at least one follow loads the homepage

steps.title: Load Homepage
steps.tooltip: FollowedSellersStrip mounts on the homepage (src/app/(frontend)/page.tsx). useFollowedSellerListings fires query when isAuthenticated && !authLoading. Strip is completely absent for guests — no empty state, no skeleton.

steps.title: Fetch Followed Listings
steps.tooltip: Queries follows table for followed member/shop IDs, then fetches up to 20 recent active listings ordered by published_at descending. Returns { listings: ListingWithPhotos[] }. Returns { listings: [] } (not 404) when user has no follows.

errorCases.result: Failed to fetch followed seller listings

steps.title: Render Listings Strip
steps.tooltip: ListingScrollStrip renders horizontally scrollable listing cards under the title 'From Sellers You Follow'. Component returns null when listings.length === 0 and isLoading is false — strip is invisible when the user follows no one or all followed sellers have no active listings.

paths.label: Yes
paths.detail: Strip renders with up to 20 listing cards

paths.label: No
paths.detail: Component returns null — strip is hidden
